# ChatGPT Work Manual Build - field-hockey-coaching

This target does not have a built-in API publisher in `skill-tooling`.
Use the generated upload bundles in `uploads/` to create ChatGPT Work skills manually.

Recommended flow:

1. In ChatGPT, open `Skills` from your profile menu.
2. Select `Create`.
3. Select `Upload from your computer`.
4. Upload the matching `.zip` file from `uploads/`.
5. Repeat for each skill you want available in the workspace.

- `uploads/field-hockey-coaching-staff.zip`
